elvs_crude_t-shirt_male.author: Elvaerwyn
elvs_crude_t-shirt_male.description: A version of the Crude T-shirt for female models by Joel Palmius for Male Makehuman models. Basic Template included. Do as you wish with it.

joepal_crude_t-shirt_female.author: Joel Palmius
joepal_crude_t-shirt_female.description: Seems I forgot to upload this one when I made the crude series. The crude series of clothes are intended as starting points for further development. They are mostly low-poly and intended for subdivision and may therefore look a bit clunky inside MakeHuman . Each piece comes with a plain diffuse texture where the faces have been painted plain white. If you modify or texture paint one of the pieces in this series and want to share just upload it again here as if you were the original author of it.

namuhekam_male_polo_shirt.author: namuhekam
namuhekam_male_polo_shirt.description: Basic polo shirt for men. Use a subdivision modifier to improve the appearance of the geometry. Also fits females with additional tweaking to the mesh. Greater deformations in extremes on muscle slider. It has not been tested in older versions of MakeHuman.

skalldyrssuppe_tube_top_funky_colors.author: skalldyrssuppe
skalldyrssuppe_tube_top_funky_colors.description: this is my first clothes-entry im still a beginner so it has some problems when using specialized topology if anyone know how to correct this i would really appreciate some help. the 'bump' file is not a bump its the original unwrap so you can make your own diffuse

toigo_basic_tucked_t-shirt.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_basic_tucked_t-shirt.description: This is a basic T-shirt with the bottom hemline scaled so that the shirt looks tucked into pants. It was made for adult male humans but will fit other average humans. A subsurf of at least two is recommended. I designed it to be worn with my Wool Pants -- seen in example pic -- http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/wool_pants.html but with a little adjustment it can also be paired with other bottoms. The bump texture is needed for realism. Several other colors are in Materials. Illustration was rendered with subsurf set to two. Model Jerome is also wearing Mindfront's Shoes Monk Strap male http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/shoes_monk_strap_male.html

toigo_bodice-style_top.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_bodice-style_top.description: This is a bodice-style top that will fit most female humans. Some slight adjustments may be needed for senior and plus-size humans. I have included diffuse specular and normal maps and the .mhmat file should get them all imported into Blender where their properties can be adjusted according to preference and render engine. Kendra is also wearing my Tiered Skirt Mini http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/tiered_skirt_mini.html

toigo_camisole_top.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_camisole_top.description: This is a camisole-style top that will fit female and mostly female humans. It was made with Blender's cloth simulator. A diffuse texture is included. Illustration shows top with subsurf of two and some slight adjustments were made around the waist to fit the top over the skirt. Kira is also wearing Jeans skirt by punbkduck http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/jeans_skirt.html .

toigo_fisherman_sweater.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_fisherman_sweater.description: This is a fisherman knit sweater designed for adult males but will fit other average humans. The texture comes with a normal map which is essential to make the sweater look more sweater-like. Five other colors are available in Materials. Illustration model Hal is also wearing Mindfront's M Trousers 01 which can be found here: http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/m_trousers_01.html

toigo_keyhole_tank_top.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_keyhole_tank_top.description: This is a keyhole style tank top that fits most female humans. It was made using Blender's cloth sewing springs. Recommended modifiers: Solidify .1 in/.25 cm -1 only rim and Subsurf 1 will do but 2 is better . Six more materials are available in Materials. Yvonne is also wearing Tight Jeans by punkduck.

toigo_turtleneck_halter_top.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_turtleneck_halter_top.description: This is turtleneck halter top which is meant to be matched with my tiered skirt http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/tiered_skirt.html but can be worn with any kind of bottoms or none at all if that's your thing . It will fit most female humans and even some males. The neck area may need slight adjusting on toddler senior and/or plus-size humans. Both the skirt and top use the same diffuse texture. Six other colors are available in Materials.
